query: SELECT id, title, source FROM news_articles ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2iFEgFdrATjKgtV.root --database ajVH3qXXUrYQwri7iw5iij --execute SELECT id, title, source FROM news_articles ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;
